inputs.behavior_pattern: Every morning I check the overnight CI runs and re-kick any that failed on flaky tests.
inputs.constraints: Never re-kick more than twice; never touch non-CI workflows.

routine_proposal.action: summarize overnight CI; re-kick failures flagged flaky
routine_proposal.rollback: disable routine; no state to revert

notes: Proposes a routine with trigger, action, guardrails, and rollback, gated on explicit enablement approval.
